entity.label: Eleasah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One of the descendants of Judah, of the family of Hezron (1 Chr. 2:39, “Eleasah”).

nodes.label: Eleasah
nodes.description: One of the descendants of Judah, of the family of Hezron (1 Chr. 2:39, “Eleasah”).

verses.text: And Azariah begat Helez, and Helez begat Eleasah,
And Eleasah begat Sisamai, and Sisamai begat Shallum,
